'''鈭歨-d-zh''' ('''hadazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knag|knag]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-d-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knag|knag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-d-zh
|-
! Lemma
| hadazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hadazhithi|hadazhithi]] || [[word:hadazhiji|hadazhiji]] || [[word:hadazhishi|hadazhishi]] || [[word:hadazhi|hadazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadazhuthuth|hadazhuthuth]] || [[word:hadazhujuj|hadazhujuj]] || [[word:hadazhushush|hadazhushush]] || [[word:hadazh|hadazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadazhuthu|hadazhuthu]] || [[word:hadazhuju|hadazhuju]] || [[word:hadazhushu|hadazhushu]] || [[word:hadazhu|hadazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadazhufuth|hadazhufuth]] || [[word:hadazhufuj|hadazhufuj]] || [[word:hadazhufush|hadazhufush]] || [[word:hadazhuf|hadazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hadazhethe|hadazhethe]] || [[word:hadazheje|hadazheje]] || [[word:hadazheshe|hadazheshe]] || [[word:hadazhe|hadazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadazhothoth|hadazhothoth]] || [[word:hadazhojoj|hadazhojoj]] || [[word:hadazhoshosh|hadazhoshosh]] || [[word:hadazh|hadazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadazhotho|hadazhotho]] || [[word:hadazhojo|hadazhojo]] || [[word:hadazhosho|hadazhosho]] || [[word:hadazho|hadazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadazhofoth|hadazhofoth]] || [[word:hadazhofoj|hadazhofoj]] || [[word:hadazhofosh|hadazhofosh]] || [[word:hadazhof|hadazhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hadazh忙th忙|hadazh忙th忙]] || [[word:hadazh忙j忙|hadazh忙j忙]] || [[word:hadazh忙sh忙|hadazh忙sh忙]] || [[word:hadazh忙|hadazh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadazhathath|hadazhathath]] || [[word:hadazhajaj|hadazhajaj]] || [[word:hadazhashash|hadazhashash]] || [[word:hadazh|hadazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadazhatha|hadazhatha]] || [[word:hadazhaja|hadazhaja]] || [[word:hadazhasha|hadazhasha]] || [[word:hadazha|hadazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadazhafath|hadazhafath]] || [[word:hadazhafaj|hadazhafaj]] || [[word:hadazhafash|hadazhafash]] || [[word:hadazhaf|hadazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:hadazhasha|hadazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gohadazhasha|gohadazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokihadazhasha|gokihadazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:hadazhn眉sha|hadazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gohadazhnkn眉sha|gohadazhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokihadazhn眉sha|gokihadazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hadazhsh毛sha|hadazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohadazhnksh毛sha|gohadazhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihadazhsh毛sha|gokihadazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hadazhrosha|hadazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohadazhnkrosha|gohadazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihadazhrosha|gokihadazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hadazhmusha|hadazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohadazhnkmusha|gohadazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadazhmusha|gokihadazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:hadazhsherasha|hadazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gohadazhnksherasha|gohadazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokihadazhsherasha|gokihadazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:hadazhngasha|hadazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gohadazhnkngasha|gohadazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokihadazhngasha|gokihadazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hadazhyasha|hadazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohadazhnkyasha|gohadazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokihadazhyasha|gokihadazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:hadazhyamasha|hadazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gohadazhnkyamasha|gohadazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokihadazhyamasha|gokihadazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:hadazhn眉sh毛sha|hadazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohadazhnkn眉sh毛sha|gohadazhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihadazhn眉sh毛sha|gokihadazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hadazhn眉rosha|hadazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohadazhnkn眉rosha|gohadazhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihadazhn眉rosha|gokihadazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadazhn眉musha|hadazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohadazhnkn眉musha|gohadazhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadazhn眉musha|gokihadazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:hadazhsh毛n眉sha|hadazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohadazhnksh毛n眉sha|gohadazhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihadazhsh毛n眉sha|gokihadazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hadazhsh毛rosha|hadazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohadazhnksh毛rosha|gohadazhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihadazhsh毛rosha|gokihadazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadazhsh毛musha|hadazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohadazhnksh毛musha|gohadazhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadazhsh毛musha|gokihadazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:hadazhron眉sha|hadazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohadazhnkron眉sha|gohadazhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihadazhron眉sha|gokihadazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:hadazhrosh毛sha|hadazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohadazhnkrosh毛sha|gohadazhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihadazhrosh毛sha|gokihadazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadazhromusha|hadazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohadazhnkromusha|gohadazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadazhromusha|gokihadazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:hadazhmun眉sha|hadazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohadazhnkmun眉sha|gohadazhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihadazhmun眉sha|gokihadazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:hadazhmush毛sha|hadazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohadazhnkmush毛sha|gohadazhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihadazhmush毛sha|gokihadazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hadazhmurosha|hadazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohadazhnkmurosha|gohadazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihadazhmurosha|gokihadazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:hadazh|hadazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:h忙d忙zh|h忙d忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hohadazh|hohadazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoh忙d忙zh|hoh忙d忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohadazh|hohohadazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoh忙d忙zh|hohoh忙d忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉hadazh|n眉hadazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉h忙d忙zh|n眉h忙d忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉hadazh|n眉n眉hadazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉h忙d忙zh|n眉n眉h忙d忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂hadazh|n茂hadazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂h忙d忙zh|n茂h忙d忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂hadazh|n茂n茂hadazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂h忙d忙zh|n茂n茂h忙d忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luhadazh|luhadazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luh忙d忙zh|luh忙d忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhadazh|luluhadazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluh忙d忙zh|luluh忙d忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lihadazh|lihadazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lih忙d忙zh|lih忙d忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihadazh|lilihadazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilih忙d忙zh|lilih忙d忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kohadazh|kohadazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koh忙d忙zh|koh忙d忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohadazh|kokohadazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoh忙d忙zh|kokoh忙d忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kehadazh|kehadazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keh忙d忙zh|keh忙d忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehadazh|kekehadazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeh忙d忙zh|kekeh忙d忙zh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
